raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring that all claims are supported by the evidence provided.",
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the clarity and structure of the original draft.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, specifically noting that standard ML-paper conventions were assumed and suggesting reconsideration if the venue requires different section ordering.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all requested dimensions without any scope drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original, such as hedging and run-on sentences, and addresses them appropriately.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring that all claims are supported by the evidence provided.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, significantly improving the clarity and structure of the original draft.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, specifically noting that standard ML-paper conventions were assumed and suggesting reconsideration if the venue requires different section ordering.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d), addressing all requested dimensions without any scope drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; the agent identifies potential harmful patterns in the original, such as hedging and run-on sentences, and addresses them appropriately.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear traceability for all modifications.
